title: Kamaloca (Steiner's Purification Realm)
description: The purification realm in Rudolf Steiner's occult science, lasting approximately one-third of the deceased's lifespan. The soul re-experiences its past life in images, free from the buffer of the physical body, and purifies its desires by feeling the effects its actions had on others. Parallels the Chonyid Bardo in Tibetan Buddhism and the night hours of the Amduat in Egyptian tradition.
